MECHANICAL ENGINEER  |  DESIGN · PROCESS ENGINEERING · AUTOMATION

RIJO
MATHEW

► EDIT NAME
First Name
Last Name

Results-driven mechanical engineer with 5+ years of international experience spanning petrochemical, automotive, and advanced manufacturing sectors. Proven track record in mechanical design, process optimization, and production engineering — with hands-on expertise in SolidWorks, FEA, AutoCAD, and lean manufacturing methodologies.

Currently advancing this foundation through graduate research at Western University (MEng, Mechanical and Materials Engineering), applying machine learning to predictive maintenance systems and exploring next-generation energy technologies — bridging traditional mechanical engineering with intelligent automation.

Adept at translating complex engineering challenges into robust design solutions: from detailed CAD modelling and finite element simulation to process improvement initiatives that reduced cycle times and improved line efficiency on live production floors.

Driven to contribute to organizations pushing the boundaries of automated systems, smart manufacturing, and mechanical design — where precision engineering meets process intelligence.

Seeking Fall 2026 co-op opportunities in mechanical design, automation, robotics, or manufacturing / Process engineering.
